positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic mountain landscape at sunrise. The scene features sharp, interlocking peaks and valleys rendered in deep indigo, burnt orange, and soft lavender hues. In the foreground, a single stylized deer silhouette stands amidst abstract, sharp rock formations. The composition should use strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient sky, emphasizing clean lines and high contrast. Ideal for a central apparel placement. Art style: Neo-modern, vector graphic quality, geometric abstraction, graphic novel aesthetic. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the rising sun, creating crisp edges. Composition: Symmetrical, centered, high impact.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, lowres, artifacts, bad anatomy, jpeg compression, cluttered, gradient sky overpainting, faded colors
